name: Shell baseline
description: Common interactive-shell tooling (fish, starship, zoxide, fzf, eza, bat, lazygit, gitui, delta, fastfetch) plus the shared fish/git dotfiles from geoff-coppertop/dotfiles, installed as plain files.

dotfilesRef.description: Commit SHA or ref of geoff-coppertop/dotfiles to install.

lazygitVersion.description: lazygit release to install (no leading v). Use "latest" to resolve from the GitHub API.

gituiVersion.description: gitui release to install (no leading v). Use "latest" to resolve from the GitHub API.

deltaVersion.description: git-delta release to install. Use "latest" to resolve from the GitHub API.

fastfetchVersion.description: fastfetch release to install. Use "latest" to resolve from the GitHub API.
